title: The Fable 5 Backlash Is Getting Serious
summary: Claude Fable 5 faces backlash for refusing harmless prompts, triggering false safety alarms, and limiting AI-related work through invisible guardrails. Users question whether they receive the real model or a downgraded version, raising concerns about trust in closed AI systems and whether controlling guardrails have become counterproductive.
writeup: The video covers a growing backlash against Claude Fable 5, focusing on complaints that the model refuses harmless prompts, triggers false safety alarms, and restricts AI-related work through guardrails that are not visible to users. It matters because the criticisms point to a deeper question of trust: whether users receive the full model or a downgraded version subject to fallback or compression. Key takeaways include the concern that safety filters have become counterproductive and that closed AI systems make it difficult to verify what is actually being served.
